texto: To some people, I may seem calm. But if you could peer beneath the surface, you would see that I'm like a duck--paddling, paddling, paddling.
explicacao: Metáfora atribuída a Scott Stossel: compara elementos do cotidiano para falar de temas ligados a reflexao. O trecho “To some people, I may seem calm. But if you could peer beneath the surface, you would see that I'…” usa imagem concreta para lembrar que reflexao, anxiety, paddling pedem movimento e interpretação pessoal, em tom de reflexao.

frase_original: To some people, I may seem calm. But if you could peer beneath the surface, you would see that I'm like a duck--paddling, paddling, paddling.

texto: Individuals who rate high on the so-called Anxiety Sensitivity Index, or ASI, have a high degree of what's known as interoceptive awareness, meaning they are highly attuned to the inner workings on their bodies, to the beepings and bleatings, the blips and burps, of their physiologies; they are more conscious of their heart rate, blood pressure, digestive burblings, and so forth than other people are.
explicacao: Citação de Scott Stossel sobre vínculos afetivos e cuidado mútuo. “Individuals who rate high on the so-called Anxiety Sensitivity Index, or ASI, have a high degree …” articula reflexao, anxiety, brain em registro de reflexao, com relevância para contextos como dia-chuvoso e trabalho.

frase_original: Individuals who rate high on the so-called Anxiety Sensitivity Index, or ASI, have a high degree of what's known as interoceptive awareness, meaning they are highly attuned to the inner workings on their bodies, to the beepings and bleatings, the blips and burps, of their physiologies; they are more conscious of their heart rate, blood pressure, digestive burblings, and so forth than other people are.
